body:
## Summary

Implements issue-based task splitting for #501 and updates the branch onto the latest `main`.

The `task` command now accepts a GitHub issue URL with `--split`, asks an agent for exactly the requested number of child task definitions, creates the child issues deterministically, links them to the parent through GitHub's sub-issues REST API, and updates the parent body/comment with the resulting split list.

## What Changed

- Added `task --split <issue-url>` with `--split-count` defaulting to `2`.
- Added configurable `--tool`, `--model`, and `--isolation`, with `--isolation screen` as the default for the task flow.
- Routed model execution through `agent-commander`'s `start-agent` CLI and kept GitHub issue creation/linking in Hive Mind code.
- Added Telegram `/task` and `/split` commands that accept GitHub issues only, reject pull requests, and call the shared `task` command path.
- Added deterministic JSON extraction/validation for model output before any GitHub mutations happen.
- Added real parent/child issue relationships via `POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/{issue_number}/sub_issues`, plus a managed fallback checklist section in the parent body.
- Added a changeset for the new feature.

## Agent Commander Notes

`agent-commander` is not yet installable as an npm dependency from the repository root or npm registry, so this PR uses the `start-agent` CLI when present and reports a clear error when it is missing.

Upstream issues filed:
- https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/19 for package/dependency installation.
- https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/20 for a hard read-only/no-shell planning mode.

## Verification

- `npm ci` (passes, with the existing Node 20 vs package `>=24` engine warning in this workspace)
- `node tests/test-task-split.mjs`
- `node tests/test-telegram-task-command.mjs`
- `node experiments/test-task.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`
- `npm test`
- `npm run check:duplication`

Fixes #501

commits.messageHeadline: Initial commit with task details for issue #501

commits.messageBody:
…asks

This commit adds a new --split mode to the task.mjs command that allows users to
split a single task into smaller, independent tasks using Claude AI.

Features:
- New --split flag to enable split mode
- New --split-count parameter to control number of tasks to split into (default: 2)
- Split mode is mutually exclusive with --only-clarify and --only-decompose
- Validation ensures --split-count is at least 2
- Split mode automatically disables clarify and decompose modes
- Results include structured output with task count and descriptions

Implementation details:
- Added split option to yargs configuration with proper validation
- Created Phase 3: Task Split Mode that uses Claude to intelligently split tasks
- Each split task includes: name, objective, deliverables, dependencies, and complexity
- Changed from .strict() to .strictOptions() to allow positional arguments while rejecting unknown options
- Added comprehensive test coverage for split mode (3 new tests)

Testing:
- All existing tests pass (9/9 passing)
- Tests cover: help output, mutual exclusivity, and validation

Fixes #501

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.messageBody:
This commit prepares the package for release with the new split mode feature.

Changes:
- Bumped version from 0.24.29 to 0.24.30
- Added task.mjs test suite to CI test-suites job
- Added task.mjs execution tests to CI test-execution job
- Added task global command testing to CI global installation tests

This ensures the new task --split functionality is properly tested in CI.

commits.messageBody:
The --version test was failing in CI because command-stream library outputs
debug traces that appear before the version number. Updated the test to get
the last line of output (which is the actual version) instead of expecting
only a single line.

This fixes the CI failure without changing the actual functionality.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.messageHeadline: Fix task.mjs version test to handle debug trace output
Revert "Initial commit with task details for issue #501"

title: Add issue-based /task split flow
